title: Jamaican Crunchy Beef Tacos
description: A flavorful and crunchy Mexican dish that combines the spicy flavors of Jamaica with the crunch of a tasty taco.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the Jamaican jerk seasoning to the beef and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Add the diced tomato to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until tender.
Warm the tortilla chips in the oven for 5-7 minutes, until crispy.
Assemble the tacos by placing a spoonful of the beef mixture onto a tortilla chip.
Top with shredded cheese, salsa, and chopped cilantro.
